title: telemetry — retention windows
description: This module has no data store — spans + metrics are pushed to the OTLP collector; log records are pushed to the configured Monolog sink. The upstream backend (Grafana Tempo/Mimir/Loki, DataDog, Honeycomb, file rotation, etc) enforces retention windows.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 5 (storage limitation — the observability backend must comply, not us)
gdpr Art. 30 (records of processing — workspace_id + causer_id in span attributes / log records count as processing)

hot.description: backend-defined (e.g. Tempo default 14d, DataDog default 15 months for traces summary + 5 days for full)
sink-defined. Loki default 30d, DataDog default 15d free / 15 months paid, file rotation config'd via config('logging.channels.stack.days')

note: PII handling requires care: our redactor pipeline strips PII fields (email, phone, IP if config'd, card numbers, SSN patterns) BEFORE export. This is our part of the retention story — minimising what leaves the app.
